title: yonglingia nitida
side_effects: Yonglingia nitida can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high levels of toxic compounds like alkaloids and glycosides. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant can lead to headaches, dizziness, and even respiratory issues in some individuals. In severe cases, improper use of Yonglingia nitida may cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and swelling, and can also interact negatively with certain medications. Furthermore, using the plant in large quantities or for an extended period can potentially lead to liver damage and other serious health complications.
